propositions: A read-only HTTP JSON status endpoint serves wipChain (change, phase, tested_shas, time-in-phase), the count of Autosubmit-waiting changes, and heartbeat_age_s that land's lander_down binds to.

An autolander_errors metric is published from three feeders: the AUTOLANDER_ERROR stdout marker on any unhandled error, the AUTOLANDER_HANDBACK stdout marker on every stack hand-back, and the container unhealthy Docker health-state, with an alarm defined.
A autolander_time_in_phase_seconds metric is emitted each poll while non-idle and a CloudWatch alarm watches that metric to surface a wedged-but-alive bot.
autolander_time_to_land_seconds is emitted as individual Value datapoints per landed change (not StatisticValues) so CloudWatch computes p50/p90/p99 downstream.
The service logs to container stdout and never writes session_log.

Tests assert the status JSON shape including heartbeat_age_s, forced error/hand-back markers with metric datapoints, the time-in-phase publisher and alarm expression, and that the time-to-land PutMetricData uses a single Value with the correct metric name.
